original_text:
### Graphic Elements — Waves
- Fluid wave forms in **two colorways**: **Sunshine/Gold** and **Sky Blue/Deep Blue**; each in **long and short** variants.
- Construction: top wave layer at **70% transparency** over the base wave (Gold over Sunshine; Sky Blue over Deep Blue) — always preserve the layered, translucent quality.
- Usage: alone, or overlaid on photography or gradient backgrounds; to support layout flow, frame content, or add depth. Approved color values only.
- **Masthead gradient with logo mark** (Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K, logo mark placed at the lightest end) is the approved device for holding copy in masthead positions.

quotes: Fluid wave forms in **two colorways**: **Sunshine/Gold** and **Sky Blue/Deep Blue**; each in **long and short** variants.
top wave layer at **70% transparency** over the base wave (Gold over Sunshine; Sky Blue over Deep Blue) — always preserve the layered, translucent quality.
Usage: alone, or overlaid on photography or gradient backgrounds; to support layout flow, frame content, or add depth. Approved color values only.

rules.intent: Maintain the approved dimensional wave device and its constrained palette.
rules.rule_text: Use fluid waves only in the Sunshine/Gold or Sky Blue/Deep Blue colorways, with long or short variants. Construct each wave with a top layer at 70% transparency over its base (Gold over Sunshine; Sky Blue over Deep Blue), preserving the layered translucent quality. Waves may stand alone or overlay photography or gradient backgrounds to support layout flow, frame content, or add depth; use approved color values only.

quotes: **Masthead gradient with logo mark** (Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K, logo mark placed at the lightest end) is the approved device for holding copy in masthead positions.
**Masthead gradient with logo mark** (Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K, logo mark placed at the lightest end) is the approved device for holding copy in masthead positions.

rules.intent: Provide an approved masthead treatment that keeps copy and branding legible and consistently arranged.
rules.rule_text: For copy in masthead positions, use the approved Sunshine-to-lightest-end masthead gradient device and place the logo mark at the lightest end.
